abilities.name: 주눅
abilities.description: 주눅이 들어 스피드가 올라가는 타입이 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.
Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.
